current_stage: Phase 4: CLI Remote Control & Auto-Approve Integration (Complete)

operations_log.description: Created myBIZcon subfolder, implementation_plan.md and task.md. Pre-configured the cumulative tracker.

operations_log.action: Add prompt templates and REST mock simulation client

Added mock_test_client.py with pure REST Python implementation and no external dependencies. Committed and pushed successfully.

operations_log.action: Complete Phase 2 MVP - Android Client & FastAPI Workspace Sync
operations_log.description: Developed Android Accessibility configuration and service class for scraping group and direct chats. Created floating overlay service supporting three translation display modes. Built FastAPI backend main server including Workspace endpoints for Calendar schedules, Tasks injection, and Drive Markdown transcript backups. Committed and pushed successfully.
Updated walkthrough.md documenting Phase 2 accomplishments, layout details, and API server pathways, synchronized successfully on GitHub.

operations_log.action: Complete Phase 2.5 - PC Client & APK Build Setup
operations_log.description: Created beautiful Tkinter PC Desktop Client containing system status monitors, active context simulator, and floating transparent Windows subtitle overlays. Set up full Android Gradle project layout (build.gradle, settings.gradle) and an automated build batch compiler (build_apk.bat) producing app-debug.apk under Windows. Committed and pushed successfully.

Created and synchronized mybizcon_chronicle.md inside the project workspace directory to preserve full context history, dialogue archives, technical choices, and environment setup guidelines for immediate replication on any other PC. Committed and pushed successfully.

operations_log.action: Complete Phase 3 & 3.5 MVP - Audio DSP Preprocessing, Speaker Diarization, Voice Pipelines, and Web Copilot
operations_log.description: Developed PC client audio recorder module with dynamic VAD RMS Noise Gate and High-Pass Filters. Coded Whisper STT & ElevenLabs TTS voice pipelines. Created diarization engine using Gemini multimodal audio context with automated Workspace calendar/task sync and speaker tone emotion tracking. Update client UI and push origin successfully.

operations_log.action: Complete Phase 4 - Multi-Messenger Platform Adapters & Zero-Dependency RAG Indexing
operations_log.description: Developed Slack (markdown prioritized, bullet lists), KakaoTalk (friendly tone, localized honorifics, compact mobile bubble spacing), Telegram, and WhatsApp adapters in relationship engine. Built pure-python Vector Space TF-IDF and Cosine Similarity RAG engine scanning historical Drive backups for semantic few-shot style replication. Integrated platform selection combobox and RAG manual reindexing button in Tkinter PC Client dashboard.

operations_log.action: AI Reviewer Control Integration for agy and codex CLIs
operations_log.description: Formally integrated agy CLI and codex CLI auto-approval and remote control configurations. Analyzed CLI executable flags, discovering --dangerously-skip-permissions for agy and --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox / --ask-for-approval never for codex to programmatically bypass interactive prompts. Integrated this audit decision into the permanent documentation guides.
